name: SLE - Diagnosis Code Query (Multi-Organ Involvement)
description: Tests ability to find SLE patients via diagnosis codes. SLE is a multi-organ systemic autoimmune disease documented under multiple SNOMED codes by organ involvement: parent SLE, multisystem involvement, organ/system involvement, lupus nephropathy, and SLE with pericarditis. Synthea distributes patients across these clinical phenotypes.
prompt: Find all patients with a diagnosis of systemic lupus erythematosus, including SLE with multisystem involvement, organ-specific lupus (such as lupus nephropathy or lupus pericarditis).

prompts.broad: Find all patients diagnosed with systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) — including the parent SLE concept and organ-involvement variants such as multisystem SLE, organ/system involvement, lupus nephropathy, and SLE with pericarditis.
prompts.expert: I need to identify all SLE patients. SLE is documented under multiple SNOMED codes from the MITRE SLE VSAC: Systemic lupus erythematosus (55464009) is the parent concept, with organ-involvement variants Multisystem SLE (239890001), SLE with organ/system involvement (239887007), Nephropathy due to SLE (295101000119105), and SLE with pericarditis (309762007). Search Condition resources for all five codes.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with SLE diagnosis codes. Tests organ-involvement code variation for systemic autoimmune disease.

required_codes.display: Systemic lupus erythematosus with multisystem involvement
Systemic lupus erythematosus with organ/system involvement
Nephropathy co-occurrent and due to systemic lupus erythematosus
